message:
Merge PR #2893: fix: skip zombie detection for done/nuked polecats (#2795)

Done/nuked polecats with dead sessions are expected — they completed
or were intentionally stopped. Without this check, isZombieState
returns true on every patrol cycle, flooding the mayor inbox.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2893
Author: DreadPirateRobertz
